title: Lesson 221: (Grammar) - direction; way; person; lady; gentleman; method of...

intro_cards.title: Way of Doing: 方 (かた)
intro_cards.body:
方 (かた) means 'way of doing' / 'how to do ~' when attached to a verb stem.

Pattern: [verb stem] + 方

• この漢字の書き方を教えてください。
(Please teach me how to write this kanji.)
• ドアの開け方がわかりません。
(I don't know how to open the door.)
• 箸の使い方 (how to use chopsticks)

方 can also mean 'person' (polite):
• あの方はどなたですか？(Who is that person?)

Common patterns:
• 読み方 (how to read) • 話し方 (way of speaking) • やり方 (way of doing it)
